evals.prompt: 지금까지 작업한 모바일 반응형 및 최상단 스크롤 보정 내역들을 커밋해줘.
evals.expected_output: The agent reviews code changes using git diff, generates a single-line English commit message following Conventional Commits, waits for user approval, and does not perform commit automatically.

evals.prompt: 현재 변경된 코드를 읽고 커밋 메시지만 제안해봐.
evals.expected_output: The agent proposes a single-line English commit message and stops without attempting to commit.
